name: MoveEquipmentWithinHome
description: Customer wants to physically move, relocate, or reposition their Virgin Media equipment — such as the router, hub, or wall socket — to a different location within their home. This typically requires an engineer visit. This is not about moving house, reporting a fault, or booking a general engineer visit.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I want to move my {equipmentToMove} to another room
Can I relocate my {equipmentToMove} to a different part of the house?
How do I get my {equipmentToMove} moved to a different wall?
I need my {equipmentToMove} repositioned closer to where I use my computer
Is it possible to move the {equipmentToMove} from the hallway to the living room?
I want my {equipmentToMove} in the bedroom instead of where it is now
Can you move the {equipmentToMove} to a more central location?
The {equipmentToMove} is in a bad spot — can it be moved?
I'd like the {equipmentToMove} moved upstairs
How much does it cost to move the {equipmentToMove} to a different room?
Do I need an engineer to move my {equipmentToMove} ?
I've just redecorated and need the {equipmentToMove} on a different wall
The wifi signal is rubbish where the {equipmentToMove} is — can it be relocated?
Can I move the {equipmentToMove} myself or does an engineer need to do it?
I want to move where the broadband comes into the house
The {equipmentToMove} is too far from where we watch TV
We've converted the garage and need the {equipmentToMove} moved out there
Is it possible to have an extra {equipmentToMove} point installed in another room?
Move my {equipmentToMove} please
move equipment to different room
